name: Sphingosine
description: An amino alcohol with a long unsaturated hydrocarbon chain. Sphingosine and its derivative sphinganine are the major bases of the sphingolipids in mammals. (Dorland, 28th ed)

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Sphingosine can be increased when it is combined with Vemurafenib.

interactions.name: Ranolazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Sphingosine can be increased when it is combined with Ranolazine.

interactions.name: Lumacaftor
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Sphingosine can be decreased when it is combined with Lumacaftor.
